introduction: Please read these Terms and Conditions ('Terms', 'Terms and Conditions') carefully before using the Rich System Solutions website and services operated by Rich System Solutions Pvt Ltd ('us', 'we', or 'our'). Your access to and use of the Service is conditioned on your acceptance of and compliance with these Terms. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service. These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Rich System Solutions Pvt Ltd regarding your use of our website and services.

sections.title: 2. Description of Services
sections.content: Rich System Solutions provides digital communication and marketing services including but not limited to Bulk SMS, Bulk Voice, WhatsApp Business API, Digital Marketing, Website Development, and related solutions. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our services at any time without prior notice.

subsections.title: 2.1 Service Availability
subsections.content: Our services are provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We do not guarantee that our services will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.

subsections.title: 2.2 Service Modifications
subsections.content: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the services (or any part thereof) with or without notice. You agree that we shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of the service.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts and Registration
sections.content: To access certain features of our services, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

subsections.title: 3.1 Account Security
subsections.content: You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or any other breach of security. We will not be liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to comply with this security obligation.

subsections.title: 3.2 Account Information
subsections.content: You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process and to update such information to keep it accurate, current, and complete.

sections.title: 4. Payment Terms and Billing
sections.content: Certain services may require payment of fees. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise specified. We reserve the right to change our prices at any time with notice to you.

subsections.title: 4.1 Subscription Plans
subsections.content: Subscription plans are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. You may cancel your subscription at any time, but no refunds will be provided for the remaining period of your subscription.

subsections.title: 4.2 Payment Processing
subsections.content: Payments are processed through secure third-party payment gateways. We do not store your payment information on our servers.

subsections.title: 4.3 Late Payments
subsections.content: If your payment method fails or your account is past due, we may suspend access to your account until payment is received.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property Rights
sections.content: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of Rich System Solutions Pvt Ltd and its licensors. The Service is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of both India and foreign countries.

subsections.title: 5.1 Our Content
subsections.content: All materials displayed or performed on the Service, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, and software, are the property of Rich System Solutions or its licensors and are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.

subsections.title: 5.2 User Content
subsections.content: By submitting content to us, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, and display such content in connection with providing our services.

sections.title: 6. Acceptable Use Policy
sections.content: You agree not to use our services for any unlawful purpose or in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair our servers or networks.

subsections.title: 6.1 Prohibited Activities
subsections.content: You may not use our services to: (a) send spam or unsolicited messages; (b) transmit any harmful code; (c) harass or abuse others; (d) impersonate any person or entity; (e) engage in fraudulent activities; (f) violate any applicable laws or regulations.

subsections.title: 6.2 Content Restrictions
subsections.content: You may not transmit any content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, vulgar, obscene, or otherwise objectionable.

sections.title: 7. Third-Party Links and Services
sections.content: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by Rich System Solutions. We have no control over, and assume no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites or services.

subsections.title: 7.1 External Links
subsections.content: The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by us. You acknowledge and agree that we shall not be responsible or liable for any damage or loss caused by or in connection with the use of any such content, goods, or services available on or through any such websites or services.

sections.title: 8. Termination
sections.content: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.

subsections.title: 8.1 Effect of Termination
subsections.content: Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. All provisions of the Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity, and limitations of liability.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: In no event shall Rich System Solutions Pvt Ltd, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from (i) your use or inability to use the Service; (ii) any conduct or content of any third party on the Service; (iii) any content obtained from the Service; and (iv) unauthorized access, use, or alteration of your transmissions or content.

sections.title: 10. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: Your use of the Service is at your sole risk. The Service is provided on an 'AS IS' and 'AS AVAILABLE' basis. The Service is provided without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including, but not limited to, implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, or course of performance.

sections.title: 11. Indemnification
sections.content: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Rich System Solutions and its licensee and licensors, and their employees, contractors, agents, officers, and directors, from and against any and all claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, or debt, and expenses (including but not limited to attorney's fees), resulting from or arising out of (a) your use and access of the Service; (b) your violation of any term of these Terms; (c) your violation of any third-party right, including without limitation any copyright, property, or privacy right; or (d) any claim that your content caused damage to a third party.

sections.title: 12. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of India, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights. If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable by a court, the remaining provisions of these Terms will remain in effect.

sections.title: 13. Dispute Resolution
sections.content: Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or your use of the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996 of India. The arbitration shall take place in Nashik, Maharashtra. Each party shall bear its own costs of arbitration.

sections.title: 14. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion. By continuing to access or use our Service after those revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

sections.title: 15. Contact Information
sections.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

contactInfo.address: 4th Floor, Akravi Disha, 401, opposite Hotel City Pride, Tilakwadi, Nashik, Maharashtra 422002
